title: Dijkstra
hints: Use Dijkstra's algorithm with a priority queue (min-heap) to find shortest paths.
Initialize distance array with infinity for all nodes except source (distance 0).
Use a min-heap to always process the node with the smallest distance first.
For each node, relax all its neighbors by updating distances if a shorter path is found.
Replace infinity with -1 for unreachable nodes in the final result.
